description: For generating executive reports, findings summaries, data reports, and stakeholder briefings.
toneDescription: Authoritative and precise. Facts lead, interpretation follows. Written for time-poor executives.

clarifyingQuestions.question: What is this report about? (e.g. Q2 performance, market research findings, project status)
Who is the primary audience for this report?
Are there any decisions this report needs to support?
